My investigation level is apparrently raising too slowly for the main story. I'm fine so far, but I saw people mentioning getting stuck in a later chapter 2 stage. Is there some level grinding method?
Hi, I am new, which banner should I use?
Welcome! There are 4 "Realms" which indicate broad playstyle. Look at the banners and see what the type you like is.
so red is for healers, understand
You can try Realm study and select the red banner for rolling
All archetypes have a healing or shielding characters
The mechanic of Caros is building blood gauge to stack up blood embryos for additional effects when using your ultimates
Some characters gain more multipliers, effects, hit count, etc, once consuming one or multiple blood embryos

Maybe you can just try stuff out and see what you like. Worked for me. You don't get tons of characters from the gacha anyways, so your choices might start limited. Try the character demos to see what you prefer.
The easiest archetype to get into is Aqueour (blue), so you wanna go for Murphy for that. If you like spell casters (purple), go for horla
Click through characters and try their demos to see if you like how they play. You get gacha roll things as a reward, too.
